seoTitle: Dongara vs Donnelly River — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dongara and Donnelly River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dongara vs Donnelly River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dongara and Donnelly River.
heading: Dongara vs Donnelly River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dongara, Western Australia and Donnelly River, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dongara has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Donnelly River (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dongara or Donnelly River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dongara has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Donnelly River scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dongara scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Donnelly River scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dongara or Donnelly River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dongara has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
